title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
summary: Plans change. Here's exactly how cancellations, rescheduling, and refunds work for bookings made with Cadabam's Diagnostics.

sections.title: Cancellations
sections.body:
You can cancel any test, scan, or checkup booking and receive a refund based on when you cancel:

- **More than 2 hours before** the scheduled appointment — full refund to the original payment method.
- **Within 2 hours of** the scheduled appointment — no refund (the slot can no longer be reassigned).
- **No-shows** — no refund. The booking is treated as a completed visit.

To cancel, log in to your account, call [+91 99006 64696](tel:+919900664696), or reply to your booking confirmation.

sections.title: Rescheduling
sections.body: Rescheduling is **free up to 1 hour before** the appointment. After that we may need to issue a small operational fee depending on the test type — our team will tell you the exact amount when you call. Rescheduled bookings keep the original price you paid.

sections.title: Refund timelines
sections.body:
Refunds are processed back to the original payment method:

- **UPI** — typically within 24 hours.
- **Cards** — 3–5 business days.
- **Net banking and wallets** — 5–7 business days.

If the original payment method is no longer available (for example, a closed card), we will reach out to arrange a bank transfer.

sections.title: If we cannot deliver the service
sections.body: If a booking cannot be fulfilled for any reason attributable to us — phlebotomist no-show, sample spoilage, equipment downtime at the centre — we will offer a no-cost reschedule or a full refund, whichever you prefer. We'll also let you know the moment the issue is identified so you aren't kept waiting.

sections.title: Test-result disputes and retests
sections.body: If you believe a result is incorrect, contact us within **7 days of receiving the report**. We will re-process the sample, or collect a fresh sample if needed, at **no additional cost**. Refunds are not issued for tests whose results are clinically valid — even if the result is unfavourable — because the test itself was performed correctly.

sections.title: Packages and multi-test refunds
sections.body: For health-checkup packages and bundled tests, refunds are calculated on the package value, not the individual test list price. Tests that have already been performed within a partially completed package are deducted at their standalone price before refunding the balance.

sections.title: What is non-refundable
sections.body:
- Home-collection convenience fees once the phlebotomist has arrived at your address.
- Reports already generated and shared with you or your physician.
- Cancellations and no-shows within the cut-offs above.

sections.title: Need to talk to us?
sections.body: Call [+91 99006 64696](tel:+919900664696) or email [info@cadabamsdiagnostics.com](mailto:info@cadabamsdiagnostics.com) with your booking ID. Most refund requests are resolved within one working day.
